title: Blackjack
description: A texture pack that includes a deck of 52 cards [Optifine required]
body:
A texture pack that includes a deck of 52 cards.

**English**:

Want to play a little game of Blackjack? Now it's possible!
You just have to rename the iron nuggets: 

"Ace of hearts, spades, clubs, diamonds"
"Two of hearts, spades, clubs, diamonds"
...

+ "Playing Card package"
+ "Casino chips"

You understood !

**Français**:

Envie de jouer une petite partie de Blackjack ? C'est désormais possible !
 Il vous suffit de renommer les pépites de fer :

As de coeur, trefle, pique, carreau
Deux de coeur, trefle, pique, carreau
...

+ "Paquet de Cartes"
+ "Jeton"

Vous avez compris !
